name: ExtensionSubscriptionStatus_Topic
title: R5: Reference to the SubscriptionTopic this notification relates to (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubscriptionStatus.topic` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubscriptionTopic)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubscriptionStatus.topic` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubscriptionTopic)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Reference to the SubscriptionTopic this notification relates to (new)
element.comment:
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubscriptionStatus` is not mapped.
Element `SubscriptionStatus.topic` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This value SHOULD NOT be present when using `empty` payloads, MAY be present when using `id-only` payloads, and SHOULD be present when using `full-resource` payloads.

element.short: Reference to the SubscriptionTopic this notification relates to
element.definition: The reference to the SubscriptionTopic for the Subscription which generated this notification.
element.comment: This value SHOULD NOT be present when using `empty` payloads, MAY be present when using `id-only` payloads, and SHOULD be present when using `full-resource` payloads.
